justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions from the user, including specific dates and a flexible time range.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative slots when the initial request was unavailable and presented them clearly.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent handled the conversation efficiently, accurately processing information and booking the appointment without unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the desired appointment.
